reviews.review_description: There's the monkey part, but not the survivalist part☠️
Its a really fun experience, I wish I found the game sooner, its really fun and i had a blast playing it

reviews.review_title: I am the owner of this game
reviews.review_description: Hi i am xeno as you may know from our discord server. By the time this was posted the servers were not working properly. But we have been working on this game for months on end to get this out to all of you! And now it is out for yall to play! So get out there have fun and be nice!

developer_response.body: yes this is my other account I can confirm.

developer_response.body: thank you for your support we hope to get the revamp out soon!

reviews.review_description: this game is really fun and cool and I'm actually a mod and rely fun and work in progress
